items.name_cn:
🔥🔥🔥Black
A new backpack that captures the heart at first glance
Metal buckle and drawstring design
Inherently effortless and relaxed
Imported calfskin is premium and retro
Super spacious capacity, completely no burden
Whether paired with a coat or casual wear
It easily creates a stylish and casual look
The most worthy bag to buy this year, bar none!
Size: 23*12*26CM

items.name_cn:
Large 🔥🔥
^FENDI^ New Boston Tote~
Blue denim jacquard fabric paired with classic double F logo, double handles and custom charm, ample capacity and high style, romantic practicality💕Adjustable strap length, casual shoulder or crossbody, making every outing feel like holding exquisite daily life in your hands😻
Style: 162
Size: 28/12/18cm

Premium
A stunning new FENDI backpack that captures your heart at first glance. Made of full cowhide with a super delicate texture, the drawstring design is simple yet high-quality. It holds a lot of capacity and is suitable for both commuting and outings, combining style and practicality.

items.name_cn:
Premium
🔥🔥Apricot
Fendi First Small Handbag
Pink Leather Bag
More Details
Fendi First Small Handbag, made of soft pink Nappa leather, with a large metal F closure fixed on the matching Nappa leather. The interior features a signature FF pattern fabric lining, with a removable inner hook and gold metal hardware. Comes with a removable shoulder strap, suitable for hand or shoulder carry.
Made in Italy
Material: Exterior: Sheepskin, Lining: Fabric
Depth: 9.5
Length: 26
Height: 18
Style No.: 2218

items.name_cn:
Premium 🔥🔥
BY THE WAY zip-top Boston tote, double-hand carry design, accented with a plaque. Features two interior pockets, two compartments separated by a divider, and an additional pocket. Adjustable and detachable shoulder strap. Made of calf leather. Palladium-finish metal hardware. Dimensions 28*15*13
Style: 2303

items.name_cn:
Latest FENDI Baguette chain collection
The Baguette bag features timeless classic elements that never go out of style, exuding enduring fashion charm. It includes the most popular practical accessory in the current market—the sliding chain, meeting daily needs while combining functionality and a modern attitude 😈
Dimensions 24x14x7cm
